That means you best be sending me all yer crediterillos fast-like or my coil cannon rips your ship a new docking hatch, but without the uh... hatch.” She points straight at you through her holocam. “You’ll do it if you know what’s good for you!” You have a moment to respond, and in that moment you can’t help but notice that the sassy pirate is dressed like she’s heading to a rave, not a battle. It’s hard not to notice lipstick painted on that thick, even through a hologram. Well, whatever her dress, she looks deadly serious about that threat. Are you going to bribe your way out of this mess or fight for your freedom?"])))

\n\nSomething tells you she isn’t here for just your money.

\n\n"+textify(mW||(mW=(0,Ce.Z)(["The airlock hisses as the victorious gabilani pirate makes a triumphal procession into the belly of your beaten ship. Her eyes sparkle with smug mischief. It’s almost funny watching her usher herself inside, that voluptuously-stacked body barely squeezing through the hatch with a grunt. She rubs her mammoth mounds and gives ‘em a lusty squeeze - so much so that they threaten to burst forth from their latex confinement like lust-maximized missiles."])))

\n\n“Anyspit, since I’m soooo nice, I’ll give ya something back.” She grins broadly, closing in with exaggerated steps that make every part of her fleshy body jiggle enticingly, pressing her fat fucking tits against your [pc.skinFurScalesNoun] so tightly you can feel each thudding heartbeat through them.
